DAILY LIFE.description: Mornings, habits, routines. The small stuff that's actually everything.

subjects.subject: Morning Routine
questions: What's the first thought that goes through your mind when you wake up most mornings?
If you could change one thing about your current morning routine, what would it be?

subjects.subject: The 5 Senses
questions: Which of your five senses is the most developed?
If you had to lose one sense forever, which one would you sacrifice?

subjects.subject: Birthdays
questions: How do you like to celebrate your birthday?
If you could choose your perfect birthday gift this year, what would it be?

subjects.subject: Sleep Habits
questions: What time do you usually wake up?
How many hours do you sleep on average per night?

subjects.subject: Drinks
questions: What's the most original or strange drink you've ever tasted?
What's your favorite cocktail?

subjects.subject: Sounds
questions: What natural sound do you love to listen to?

subjects.subject: Living Together
questions: Who would you want to live with as a roommate?
What's the worst habit you've had to put up with from someone you lived with?

subjects.subject: Messaging
questions: What's your preferred way to communicate? (SMS, Messaging apps, Calls, Instagram...)

subjects.subject: Grocery Shopping
questions: What's the first thing you put in your shopping cart?
What's your favorite store or website to shop at?

subjects.subject: Cooking
questions: What ingredient do you put in absolutely everything you cook?
What type of cuisine do you prefer?

subjects.subject: Language Curiosities
questions: What's your favorite word in a foreign language?
Is there a word whose meaning you misunderstood for a long time?

subjects.subject: Messages & Writing
questions: Who do you message the most?

subjects.subject: Holidays & Celebrations
questions: What's your favorite holiday or celebration?

subjects.subject: Sweet Tooth
questions: What's your favorite candy or sweet?
What's your general guilty pleasure?

questions: What current societal trend completely baffles you?
If you had to describe today's society in 3 words, what would they be?

subjects.subject: Books
questions: What's the last book you read?

subjects.subject: Home
questions: What's the one thing in your current home you couldn't live without?

subjects.subject: Food
questions: What dish could you eat every single day?
What's the strangest thing you've ever eaten?

subjects.subject: Quirks

subjects.subject: Everyday Words
questions: What word do you use too often?
What word do you hate hearing?

subjects.subject: Specific Words
questions: What's your most-used swear word?

subjects.subject: Weird Objects
questions: What's the strangest object you own?
What's the most useless object in your home that you still refuse to throw away?

subjects.subject: Everyday Objects
questions: If you had to get through the whole day with just one object (no phone), what would you choose?
What everyday object that everyone uses have you never understood the point of?

subjects.subject: Smells
questions: What smell can you absolutely not stand?
What's the most beautiful smell in the world to you?

subjects.subject: Tastes
questions: What's your favorite fruit?
What's the food or meal you hate the most?

subjects.subject: Names
questions: What name do you hate?
What name do you think is the coolest?

subjects.subject: Your Name
questions: What's a nickname that's used for you the least?
If you had to change your name, what would you choose?

subjects.subject: Cooking Recipes
questions: What recipe have you spectacularly failed at least once?
What's your signature recipe?

subjects.subject: Restaurants
questions: What's your favorite restaurant?

subjects.subject: Evening Rituals
questions: What's your ideal ritual after a long day?
What's your ritual before going to sleep?

subjects.subject: Symbols
questions: If you had to represent your personality with a single object, which one would you choose?

questions: What's your date of birth (day and month)?

subjects.subject: Habits

subjects.subject: Qualities in Question
questions: Is there a quality you thought you had but eventually started to question?

subjects.subject: Nicknames

subjects.subject: Your Look & Beauty
questions: What would you rate yourself out of 10 in terms of looks?

WYD?.description: What would you do ? We put you in a scenario, show us how you act

subjects.subject: Friendship Conflict
questions: A friend doesn't wish you happy birthday. What do you do?
You find out your friend group organized an event without inviting you. What do you do?

subjects.subject: Social Situations
questions: You're about to cross a family member you can't stand in the street, and they haven't spotted you yet. What do you do?
You run into your ex in the street with their new partner. How do you handle the conversation?

subjects.subject: Moral Dilemma
questions: You find a wallet with $500 and an ID on the subway. What do you do?
Your best friend tells you they've been cheating on their partner for 6 months and asks you to say nothing. What do you do?

subjects.subject: Travel Mishaps
questions: You miss your flight by one minute for a highly anticipated trip. What do you do?
You arrive abroad with a dead phone and no passport. What do you do?

subjects.subject: Trust & Close Ones
questions: You catch a close friend clearly lying about something important. What do you do?
In a group, someone openly mocks you and everyone else laughs. What do you do?

subjects.subject: Love & Timing
questions: A close friend you care about tells you they have feelings for you. What do you do?
You've been in a relationship for 3 years and someone incredible suddenly confesses their feelings. What do you do?

subjects.subject: Reputation & Visibility
questions: A video of you in an embarrassing situation goes viral with 2 million views. What's your reaction?
A very popular reality show contacts you to take part. What do you do?

subjects.subject: Responsibility
questions: You realize your friend is too drunk and wants to drive home. What do you do?
You see someone isolated and lost at a party. What do you do?

subjects.subject: Work Integrity
questions: You realize your colleague earns 20% more than you in the same role. What do you do?
You bomb an important presentation in front of 50 people due to a technical glitch. Five seconds of silence. What do you do?

subjects.subject: Absurd Situations
questions: You receive a very intimate text from a stranger who sent it to the wrong person. What do you do?
You realize you swapped suitcases with someone at the airport. Inside theirs, something very personal. What do you do?
